differentials.name: Renal cell carcinoma (a)  invasion of perirenal fat (b)  intratumoral metaplasia into fatty marrow (in 32% of RCCs < 3 cm in diameter) ◊  If a lesion contains fat + calcium RCC is likely, NOT angiomyolipoma!
